calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW S. KENEFICK OF THE JEFFER MANGELS & MITCHELL LLP, TEL. NO. 984-9677 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. AMY ANDERSON, TEL. NO. 866-4066 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MICHAEL HASSEN'S Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The court finds there is plenty of time to file an opposition and denied the request for continuance. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976
